challenges.title: Responsive Typography Scale
challenges.description: Create a typography scale using rem units where h1–h6 and body text scale proportionally. Use clamp() for fluid typography.
hints: Use rem for all font sizes
Use clamp(min, preferred, max) for fluid sizing
Adjust root font-size with media queries

challenges.title: Fluid Layout with calc()
challenges.description: Build a fluid layout that uses calc() to combine fixed and relative units — e.g., sidebar: 250px, main: calc(100% - 250px).
hints: Combine vw with px using calc()

challenges.title: Full-Screen Experience
challenges.description: Create a full-screen landing page using vh/vw units that adapts perfectly to any screen size with proper typography and spacing.
hints: Use vw for responsive font sizing
Add a fallback for mobile vh issues
Use min-height instead of height where appropriate
